_comment: Major maritime oil chokepoints. 'bbox' = [min_lon, min_lat, max_lon, max_lat]. 'detour_days' = extra transit days to India if this corridor is avoided. 'daily_oil_mbd' = approx million barrels/day of oil that transit it.

chokepoints.name: Strait of Hormuz
chokepoints.note: No practical seaborne detour for Gulf crude; closure is near-total disruption.

chokepoints.name: Bab-el-Mandeb / Red Sea
chokepoints.note: Avoidable via Cape of Good Hope at ~10-14 extra days.

chokepoints.name: Cape of Good Hope
chokepoints.note: The detour route itself; rarely the disruption point.
